name: schroedinger-equation-solver
description: Single-electron TDSE solver with framework-free Vulkan compute and rendering (volk+VMA+VkFFT) in an SDL3 window shell.

validation.description: Dev-time Vulkan validation layers (never linked; the loader dlopen's the DLL by its JSON manifest -- the port forces its own dynamic linkage, so the DLL lands in vcpkg_installed/<triplet>/bin even on the static triplet). Easiest: configure the `msvc-release-validation` preset (it sets this feature stickily). Manual: VCPKG_MANIFEST_FEATURES=validation. Then activate at runtime with VK_ADD_LAYER_PATH=<build>/vcpkg_installed/<triplet>/bin + VK_LOADER_LAYERS_ENABLE=*validation* + SES_VK_VALIDATION=1.
